message:
fix(ops,index,fsfs): NaN-guard SLO config validation, fix clippy lints in batch pipeline and index tests

- ops/storage.rs: Add .is_finite() guards to SloMaterializationConfig::validate() for
  error_budget_ratio, burn rate thresholds, and latency multipliers. NaN deserialized
  via #[derive(Deserialize)] bypassed all comparison-based validation since NaN comparisons
  always return false, causing silent SLO health misclassification. Added 3 regression tests.
- fsfs/runtime.rs: Move const BATCH_SIZE to top of run_one_shot_index_scaffold to fix
  clippy items_after_statements lint.
- index/lib.rs: Use inline format variables in repro_duplicate_entries_on_compaction_crash
  test assertions to fix clippy uninlined_format_args lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
